{{Infobox location
| name = Aion Sea
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Aion Sea Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Aion]] Sea is a vast and perilous ocean characterized by its unnatural properties and extreme dangers. It was created following the death throes of [[Nakothi]], whose passing leveled a continent and formed the sea. The ocean is divided into two distinct regions: the shallow Aion, which is considered manageable by lesser sailors, and the deep [[Aion]], a realm of unknowable terrors and eldritch hazards. The deep waters are inhabited by various monsters, phantoms, and ancient [[Elders]], including the [[Soul Collector]] [[Kelarac]] and the remains of [[Nakothi]] herself. The environment is prone to bizarre phenomena, such as moving islands that resemble corpses or floating debris, and storms where water rains upward. Navigating these waters is exceptionally difficult; most travelers face delays or death, and only a specialized group known as [[Navigators]] possesses the means to cross safely. These [[Navigators]] utilize unique vessels constructed with parts of [[Elderspawn]], allowing the ships to guide their [[Soulbound]] captains through the hazards. Beyond its physical dangers, the [[Aion]] is a place of immense power and historical weight, containing significant artifacts like the [[Heart of the Aion]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion]] Sea is a vast blue expanse of water that can be successfully crossed by the [[Guild]]'s [[Imperial]] [[Navigators]]. This haunted ocean is filled with various dangers, including numerous phantoms and monsters. The perils of the waters are significant enough that [[Calder]] fears [[Naberius Clayborn]] might be taken a mile beneath its surface.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion Sea]] is a body of water that can be sailed by an [[Imperial Navigator]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion Sea]] is a body of water that the [[Guild]]'s [[Navigators]] are capable of crossing.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion Sea]] is a body of water.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion Sea]] contains dangers.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] suspects [[Naberius Clayborn]] will be taken a mile under the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion Sea]] is a haunted ocean containing many monsters and phantoms.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion]] is a blue expanse.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion Sea]] is haunted by monsters.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Aion Sea]] was created by [[Nakothi]]'s death-throes.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Aion]] Sea is a body of water located at the heart of the world that requires rapid action and decisive choices from those who encounter it. Mentioned in a [[Navigator’s Guild]] report regarding [[Sleepless]] activity, this region serves as a vital location where [[Navigators]] are required for business. [[Calder]] spent ten years crossing these waters with the [[Navigators]], including five years specifically sailing the sea, and it is a place where his body might end up should he confront the Head of the [[Blackwatch]]. The area is home to the terrifying [[Cinderbeast]] and was once traversed by the Testament through its center. While [[Jerri]] expressed great eagerness to see the sea, it currently lies in a direction away from the [[Elders]], an authority [[Foster]] would rather face by throwing himself into the waters than obey.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Aion Sea]] is a location mentioned in the [[Navigator’s Guild]] report on [[Sleepless]] activity.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c1">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Aion Sea]] is a location [[Jerri]] was eager to see.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Aion Sea]] requires quick decision-making and action.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Aion Sea]] is a location where [[Calder]]'s body might end up if he deals with the Head of the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Aion Sea]] is a location at the heart of the world.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] spent ten years in the [[Navigators]] crossing the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Aion Sea]] is a body of water where [[Navigators]] are required for business.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] has spent the past five years sailing the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Cinderbeast]] is a terror from the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Aion Sea]] is currently a direction away from the [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Foster]] would throw himself into the [[Aion Sea]] rather than let an [[Elder]] tell him what to do.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Testament]] sailed through the center of the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[island]] is located at the edge of the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The colors of the [[Aion Sea]] are green and blue.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]] once dragged a massive shark out of the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Aion]] Sea serves as a body of water used for discarding objects, and it is the site where [[Kell’arack]] was once nailed to the floor. Within its expanse lies a nameless [[island]], and it is the location where [[Loreli]] can be found. While a source of bright, hopeful [[Intent]] drifts around these waters, [[Navigators]] remain the only individuals capable of catching people upon the sea. The area has also seen significant upheaval, as [[Jerri]] rose from its waters alongside a deeper, darker shadow that emerged from the depths.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kell’arack]] was nailed to the floor of the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Aion Sea]] contains a nameless [[island]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Aion Sea]] is a body of water where things are thrown.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Navigators]] are the only ones who can catch people on the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A source of bright, hopeful [[Intent]] drifts around the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Aion Sea]] is a location where [[Loreli]] is.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A deeper, darker shadow rose from the depths of the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] rose from the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Aion]] Sea is a vast body of water characterized by shallow areas that host rare [[Elder]] activity. This location served as the site where [[Kelarac]] was once nailed to the floor. From the courtyard of the [[Imperial Palace]], [[Shera]] was able to gaze miles deep into its waters. Following a significant event, the [[Heart of Nakothi]] was kicked into the sea, and [[Jyrine]]'s body eventually rose from its depths.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Aion Sea]] is a location where [[Kelarac]] was nailed to the floor.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Aion Sea]] is a body of water where the shallow area has rare [[Elder]] activity.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] could see from the [[Imperial Palace courtyard]] to miles deep in the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jyrine]]’s body rose from the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Heart of Nakothi]] was kicked into the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
